meta.title: Thiago Carvalho — Embedded Systems & Full-Stack
meta.description: Embedded systems and full-stack developer, bachelor of Computer Science from UFRRJ. I build C/C++ firmware at Digicare Biomedical and modern web applications with Next.js and TypeScript.

hero.name: Thiago Carvalho
hero.tagline: From C/C++ firmware to the web interface: I build embedded systems and modern full-stack applications.

about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I hold a bachelor's in Computer Science from UFRRJ (2025) and work with embedded systems at Digicare Biomedical, developing C/C++ firmware for biomedical devices.
about.paragraph2: I'm also a full-stack developer: I build modern web applications with Next.js and TypeScript. Low-level programming and web development are the two sides of what I love doing — from bare-metal to the interface.
